research_summary.exam_overview: The KAS exam consists of three stages: Prelims, Mains, and Interview. The Prelims stage has a weightage of various subjects, while the Mains stage tests the candidate's in-depth knowledge of the subjects. The exam has a high difficulty level and requires a thorough understanding of the syllabus.

actionable_insights: Focus on high-priority subjects like Science & Technology, Current Affairs, Karnataka GK, and CSAT.
Emphasize on topics like General Studies, International Relations, Karnataka Geography, and Polity.
Develop a strong understanding of the syllabus and previous year question trends.
Practice and improve time management skills to tackle the exam effectively.
